40.reason: [Exponent calculation is incorrect for numbers like "0.001"; should be -(i-1) but logic fails when input ends right after first non-zero digit]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Exponent calculation is incorrect for numbers like "0.001"; should be -(i-1) but logic fails when input ends right after first non-zero digit]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Exponent calculation is incorrect for numbers like 0.001; should be -(i-1) but logic fails when input ends right after first non-zero digit (e.g., "0.1")]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [The exponent calculation is incorrect when the first non-zero digit is at position i; it should be e-(i-1) only if counting starts after the decimal point correctly, but more critically, if there are no digits after a[i], printing '.' is invalid per problem requirements. Also, this line always prints a decimal point even if there are no following digits, violating the output format.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect exponent calculation: should be -(i-1) but printed as negative literal; also fails when there are no digits after the first non-zero (e.g., "0.0" or "0.1" with no further digits)]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Exponent calculation is incorrect for numbers like 0.001; should be -(i-1) but logic fails when input ends right after significant digit (e.g., "0.1")]
